Use.title: Master · Notes.
Use.subtitle: Presentation-level chrome and speaker notes.
Use.inside1: Master · static decoration that repeats on every page
Use.inside3: SlideNumber · auto folio rendered by pptxgenjs
Use.inside4: Notes · per-slide speaker notes attached as a child
Use.epigraph: The master is the magazine's running head — invisible until you remove it.
Use.meta: Master · MasterText · MasterRect · MasterLine · SlideNumber · Notes
Use.leftMeta: 6 meta elements · pptx-master compilation · per-slide note attachment

Use.title: Master — chrome that repeats on every page
Use.lede: Defines static decoration that gets compiled into a true PowerPoint master via pptxgenjs.defineSlideMaster. Pages with master='NAME' inherit the chrome.

Foreach.items: [ {"attr":"name","type":"string","desc":"Master name (referenced by Slide master='…').","req":true}, {"attr":"backgroundColor","type":"color","desc":"Solid background tint."}, {"attr":"backgroundPath","type":"string","desc":"Path / URL to a background image."}, {"attr":"backgroundData","type":"string","desc":"Base64-encoded background."}, {"attr":"margin","type":"length","desc":"Number or {top,right,bottom,left}."} ]

[ {"attr":"MasterText","type":"static","desc":"Static text label (x/y/w/h required)."}, {"attr":"MasterImage","type":"static","desc":"Static image (src + x/y/w/h)."}, {"attr":"MasterRect","type":"static","desc":"Static rectangle (fill/border)."}, {"attr":"MasterLine","type":"static","desc":"Static line (x/y/w/h, line.color)."}, {"attr":"SlideNumber","type":"auto","desc":"Auto page number — pptxgenjs built-in."}, {"attr":"VStack/HStack/Text/…","type":"layout","desc":"Page-like layout nodes are accepted; flattened into master objects after layout."} ]

Use.title: Master vs. layout
Use.body: Each Master maps to one PPTX layout. Multiple layouts under one master (Title vs. Title-and-content) are not yet expressible via XML. <Table> and <Chart> inside a Master are not supported.

Use.title: Notes — speaker notes, and Document-level options
Use.lede: Notes attach to a slide via a child element. The <Document> child of <SlideGlance> carries the deck-wide options: page size, default master, and document-wide font / colour defaults inherited by every Text descendant.

Use.desc: Multi-line text. Becomes the slide's speaker note in PPTX.

Foreach.items: [ {"attr":"size","type":"enum","desc":"A4 · 16:9 · 4:3 · letter — built-in slide sizes."}, {"attr":"width / height","type":"number","desc":"Custom slide size in pixels."}, {"attr":"defaultMaster","type":"string","desc":"Master name for slides without master='…'."}, {"attr":"fontFamily","type":"string","desc":"Default font family for every Text descendant."}, {"attr":"fontSize","type":"number","desc":"Default font size (pt)."}, {"attr":"color","type":"color","desc":"Default text colour."}, {"attr":"bold / italic / strike / underline","type":"boolean","desc":"Document-wide text attribute defaults."}, {"attr":"lineHeight","type":"number","desc":"Default line height multiplier."} ]

Use.title: That's the entire DSL.
Use.body: Every node, every meta element, every recipe — rendered with the Airtable signature surface system.
